_comment: Manual overrides for TMDB resolution. Edit when an automated title+year search picks the wrong film, or when Malcolm has selected a non-default poster on Letterboxd that TMDB's default doesn't match. The refresh script consults this file before falling back to TMDB's default search result.

_schema.tmdbId: Maps letterboxdSlug -> TMDB movie id (number). Use when title+year search picks the wrong film (e.g. two films share a name in the same year).
_schema.posterPath: Maps letterboxdSlug -> TMDB poster path string (e.g. '/abc123.jpg'). Use when Malcolm's selected poster on Letterboxd differs from TMDB's default and we want to honor his choice.
